spec.description: Excludes 404 responses to avoid high-cardinality route explosion
spec.title: Request Rate by Route + Method

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, http_route) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service", deployment_environment=~"$env", http_request_method!="OPTIONS", http_response_status_code!="404"}[$__rate_interval])))

spec.description: Excludes 404 responses to avoid high-cardinality route explosion
spec.title: Latency by Route (P95)

spec.description: All 404 responses aggregated into a single series to avoid high-cardinality route explosion
spec.title: 404 Request Rate (aggregated)
